steps.title: Follow the narrative tense
steps.content: The passage uses past tense: the rover "first touched down" and "spent over six years" gathering information. The naming of the rock happened during that completed past period.

steps.title: Reject present-oriented verbs
steps.content: B, C, and D use present-oriented verb forms. Those forms break the established past-tense narration.

steps.title: Keep the past tense
steps.content: Named is simple past tense, so it fits the surrounding sequence of completed events. The answer is A.
